summary: Completed comprehensive frontend UI testing of OrthoConnect platform after major UI overhaul. All pages and components are working correctly with the new Monochrome + Teal Accent color palette and Modern health-tech design style.
passed_tests: Homepage Hero section - title, subtitle, search bar, Near me button, radius controls (5/10/25/50km)
Homepage Trust bar - 'No advertisements, No paid rankings, Free surgeon profiles, Patient-first platform'
Homepage Popular searches chips - Knee Pain, Shoulder Injury, Spine Problems, Sports Injury, Joint Replacement, Fracture Care
Homepage Find a Surgeon section - specialty links (Knee, Spine, Shoulder, Hand, Hip, Pediatric)
Homepage Know Your Condition section - 6 category cards with icons and descriptions
Homepage Red Flags section - 4 urgent care warning items
Homepage Non-Surgical Care & Rehabilitation section - Physiotherapy, Bracing, Pain Management cards
Homepage CTA section - 'Are you an Orthopaedic Surgeon?' with Create Free Profile button
Site Header - Logo, navigation links (Patient Education, About, Contact), Join as Surgeon button
Site Footer - Dark theme with Quick Links, Disclaimer, 'No ads • No rankings • Patient-first'
Mobile responsive design - Mobile menu toggle, mobile navigation links, mobile Join button
Education Hub page - Category cards with icons, descriptions, 'Explore topics' links, disclaimer
Education Category page (Knee & Sports) - 61 topics, search filter working, topic links

Education Topic page (ACL Tear) - Key Takeaways card, accordion sections (What is it, Symptoms, Causes, Treatment, Recovery), Urgent Care sidebar, Find a Specialist search, Medical Disclaimer, breadcrumbs
Search functionality - Smart search bar, radius selection, popular searches, empty state with map
Join as Surgeon page - Mobile input, Send OTP button, MOCKED OTP display, Verify & Continue button
Admin page - Login with password, Admin Dashboard with Pending/Approved/Rejected tabs, profile review panel, Approve/Reject buttons
Color palette verification - Monochrome (slate-900 #0F172A) + Teal accent (#0D9488) confirmed
Design style - Modern health-tech with cards, shadows, hover effects, proper spacing

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI components and pages working correctly)

mocked_apis.OTP verification: MOCKED - returns OTP in API response for testing (e.g., 'MOCKED OTP (for MVP testing): 918287')

design_verification.ui_style: Modern health-tech with cards, shadows, hover effects - VERIFIED
design_verification.responsive_design: Mobile menu and responsive layouts working - VERIFIED
design_verification.text_contrast: Good contrast on all backgrounds - VERIFIED

context_for_next_testing_agent: Major UI overhaul completed and verified. All pages working with new Monochrome + Teal color scheme. OTP system is MOCKED. Admin dashboard accessible with password 'admin'. Search returns empty results (no approved surgeons in test data).
